allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if ''''stitch'''' in str\(k\).lower\(\) or ''''stitch'''' in str\(v\).lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); mcps=d.get\(''''mcpServers'''',{}\); print\(json.dumps\(mcps, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t[''''name'''']\) for t in data[''''result''''][''''tools'''']]")
